scene_input.scene_summary: The Prophet Muhammad asks the Thaqīf notables to stop spreading the message.
scene_input.key_visual_action: Muhammad's hands raised in a pleading gesture

schema_output.scene_summary: The Prophet Muhammad asks the Thaqīf notables to stop spreading the message.
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 100
schema_output.moral_lesson: Importance of kindness and empathy in sharing the message of Islam

characters.name: The Prophet Muhammad
characters.appearance: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended in a gentle reassuring gesture

characters.name: A Thaqīf notable
characters.appearance: medium build, wearing a white thobe and a plain brown woolen cloak with a white cloth head covering

characters.name: Another Thaqīf notable

schema_output.narrative_text: The Prophet Muhammad visited Taif to share the message of Islam with its people, but he was met with rejection and hostility. He pleaded with the Thaqīf notables to stop spreading false information about him.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Bustling marketplace in 7th century Taif with ancient stone buildings and clay-tiled roofs in muted earth tones. Late afternoon sunlight casts long shadows across the market stalls, with the warm glow of golden light spilling through the arched doorways. The central figure seen entirely from behind: medium build, dignified upright posture, wearing a flowing white thobe with a distinctive deep green woolen cloak draped over both shoulders and a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, one hand extended in a gentle reassuring gesture. To the left and right, two figures stand facing the central figure: medium build, wearing white thobes and plain brown woolen cloaks with white cloth head coverings, their faces stern and unyielding, with one hand on their hips and the other hand grasping a staff or walking stick. Soft warm golden light, intimate and solemn mood. Medium shot at eye level. Earthy, beige, and golden palette with the deep green cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
